title: Assistant Store Manager - MedPlus South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - MedPlus South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus South Asia Partners:
MedPlus South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus South Asia Partners!
